anythingllm.description: Google Workspace MCP - Gmail, Google Drive, Google Calendar, Docs, Sheets. Setup: Create OAuth 2.0 Desktop credentials at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials and enable Gmail, Drive, Calendar APIs.

Microsoft 365 MCP - Outlook Mail, Calendar, OneDrive. Setup: Register app at https://portal.azure.com > App registrations. Add delegated permissions: Mail.Read, Mail.ReadWrite, Mail.Send, Calendars.ReadWrite, Files.ReadWrite.
